title: Pan Seared Polish Yellow Pepper Skewers
description: A crunchy and herbal Polish dish featuring yellow peppers, perfect for a crowd, with a Mediterranean twist, cooked to perfection on a binchotan grill with lardons render
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the yellow peppers into large chunks and set aside.
Cut the lardons into small pieces and render in a pan until crispy.
Thread the yellow pepper chunks onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt, black pepper, and minced garlic.
Place the skewers on the preheated grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
While the skewers are cooking, mix the chopped parsley and lemon juice in a small bowl.
Once the skewers are cooked, brush them with the parsley lemon mixture and serve hot.
Garnish with crispy lardons and serve immediately.
